title: PayloadRecord
description: A source payload envelope for a single ATS or HRIS event or record

id.description: Unique deterministic identifier for this payload record

source_system.description: Source system identifier, e.g. ashby, greenhouse, lever, personio_like

source_model.description: Model name within the source system

source_kind.description: Data provenance: public_dataset from open-apply-jobs, synthetic from docs, or event_platform

payload.description: Raw source payload object; shape varies by source_system and source_model

source_url.description: Provenance URL for the data source

notes.description: Optional notes about this specific payload record
